title: Is there a public HTML code for a website design similar to this
display_title: Is there a public HTML code for a website design similar to this
wikitext:
[]: Is there a public HTML code for a website design similar to this             Quote Post by AmberNerd » Mon Sep 18, 2023 11:00 am I really like the entire look of this website, I've known about this site for awhile now, but never got around to watching Evangelion. I wonder if this is still heavily active today. It is really cool. Old websites like this one really fascinate me, so much.

[]: Re: Is there a public HTML code for a website design similar to this             Quote Post by JoelcrNeto » Mon Sep 18, 2023 1:23 pm It's still active, but not in the same way as years ago. This site is "vintage" It runs an old version of phpBB, I don't recall the version number.
